subject: Uplift code base to Java 21
commit_message:
Uplift code base to Java 21

- Upgrade opentelemetry-bom from 1.54.0 to 1.61.0
- Upgrade opentelemetry-instrumentation-bom to 2.26.1
- Remove opentelemetry-kafka-clients-2.6 dependency (interceptor API removed)
- logstash-logback-encoder upgrade from 7.1 to 8.1
- Stable base image and remove stale TracingConsumerInterceptor

Issue-ID: CPS-3213
Change-Id: I184698ff594866320fed1b9dc187c5553b30d280
Signed-off-by: shikha0203 <shivani.khare@est.tech>
